subject: Add donor testimonial cards to Campaign page below story
description: We have testimonials[] in campaign data but may not be displaying them prominently enough. GoFundMe doesn't have this - it's a trust differentiator. Add a dedicated "What donors say" section between the story and update timeline with styled quote cards. Each card: donor name, quote text, amount donated. Frosted card style with quotation marks.

changes: Already implemented in CampaignPage.jsx lines 216-243 with styled quote cards, MessageCircle icon, donor name, date
learnings: Testimonial data has no amount field - only donorName, text, date
